title: Unify the Visual System and Information Architecture
architecture_and_product_decisions: components/villani-ui is the only token and shared primitive source for source Web, packaged Console, onboarding transcript, and Flight Recorder presentation.
The default navigation has exactly New task, Activity, Agents, and Settings; Team remains hidden and advanced routes live under Settings or direct deep links.

New task owns /console; legacy /console/home and /console/run redirect there. Activity owns /console/activity; /console/history redirects there. Existing run, session, replay, fleet, model, policy, cost, alert, task, and audit links remain valid.
Healthy infrastructure emits no permanent strip. Setup, service, storage, synchronization, migration, credential, and page recovery conditions alone create an actionable notice.
Public screens translate controller language without mutating technical artifacts or Evidence disclosures.
Onboarding resumption is browser-local presentation state. Safe repository and configured-agent choices are preselected; endpoint, pricing, capability, and service details remain under Advanced.
Activity is one chronological surface for Villani tasks and imported coding sessions, with unknown cost and duration preserved.
Exact-match packaged Console synchronization is idempotent and avoids replacing an already-correct directory.
Flight Recorder validates only its curated public protocol set while run-specific parsing continues to read internal PT0 evidence artifacts.

browser_presentation_state.failure_behavior: Setup continues when browser storage is unavailable; only cross-reload resumption is lost.

tests_added_or_extended: Shared UI light-token, reduced-motion, focus, WCAG-AA contrast, component-export, and standalone-onboarding-palette contracts.

Web route migration, exact default navigation, healthy-status silence, actionable setup/service notices, onboarding resumption/Ready repository handoff, associated form errors, empty Activity, mixed Activity, and Agents coverage.
Playwright route/deep-link/keyboard coverage plus 12 deterministic visual-regression states and a 320px overflow assertion.
Flight Recorder shared semantic token use and supported-protocol fixture filtering.

known_failures.reason: Sandboxed npm cannot launch Vite/esbuild; elevating the entire pytest process loses directory-rename visibility for the OneDrive-hosted packaged Console directory.
mitigating_evidence: Asset digest check passed for all 3 files.
Agentd passed 79 tests, including Console serving.

skipped_and_deselected.reason: RUN_CLAUDE_CODE_SMOKE was not set; the external Claude Code smoke test is explicitly opt-in.
Windows host capability guards skipped Unix-domain socket and FIFO workspace tests.
The component default addopts excludes slow, integration, and e2e markers; required closed-loop e2e coverage ran separately and passed.

security_privacy_data_loss_compatibility: No API keys, credentials, host user data, or real run content are present in screenshot fixtures or reports.
Onboarding browser state stores only stage, repository selection, and backend identifier locally; blocking storage disables resumption but not setup.
Packaged synchronization remains fail-closed on any digest or manifest mismatch and now avoids directory replacement on exact equality.
Unknown cost and duration remain unknown; no values are fabricated.
Legacy routes and bookmarked run/session/replay links are preserved through redirects or direct route support.
No controller state, acceptance eligibility, routing, retry, selection, materialization, or delivery contract changed.
The in-app browser connector was unavailable; deterministic repository Playwright/Chromium screenshots were used and visually inspected instead.

user_facing_before_after.before: Home and Run were separate primary concepts with a broad control-plane navigation.
user_facing_before_after.after: New task is the root and the default navigation has only New task, Activity, Agents, and Settings.

user_facing_before_after.before: Onboarding used standalone rounded blue/green SaaS styling.
user_facing_before_after.after: Onboarding uses the same shared light monochrome shell, tokens, typography, focus, and controls as the product.

user_facing_before_after.before: Healthy service/local status occupied permanent shell space.
user_facing_before_after.after: Healthy infrastructure is silent; only actionable failures or incomplete setup create a compact notice.

user_facing_before_after.before: History and connected surfaces exposed infrastructure-oriented terms.
user_facing_before_after.after: Activity merges Villani tasks and imported sessions and primary screens use outcome-focused user language.
Models, Policies, Replay, Fleet, Tasks, Costs, Alerts, and Audit remain reachable from Settings or deep links.

assumptions: Existing PT0 and unrelated user working-tree changes are the preserved baseline and are not claimed as PT1 work.
The configured Agentd run-options and model inventory remain authoritative setup inputs; PT1 adds no new backend setup contract.
The repository Playwright Chromium version is the visual-regression reference environment.
